## What is this?

Low-level bindings to the [littlefs][littlefs] microcontroller filesystem.

You probably want the high-level, idiomatic Rust bindings: [littlefs2][littlefs2]

Upstream release: [v2.9.3][upstream-release]

## Build configuration

By default, bindings are generated by running the `bindgen` executable from
PATH. To generate bindings through the Rust `bindgen` API instead, enable the
`bindgen` feature for this crate. Applications that depend on `littlefs2` can
enable it without a `littlefs2` feature by adding a direct dependency:

```toml
littlefs2-sys = { version = "0.3.2", features = ["bindgen"] }
```

[littlefs]: https://github.com/ARMmbed/littlefs
[littlefs2]: https://github.com/nickray/littlefs2
[upstream-release]: https://github.com/ARMmbed/littlefs/releases/tag/v2.9.3
